arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso to have limited say in Real Madrid transfers
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen manager Xabi Alonso does appear to be a Real Madrid manager in waiting, with most considering it a question of when rather than if. The Basque coach has been hotly tipped to take over from Carlo Ancelotti, and has been in contact with Los Blancos in recent months. Ancelotti’s future remains in the […] The post Xabi Alonso to have limited say in Real Madrid transfers appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Leverkusen duo closing in on their return to the pitch
arts.sum: Two important Leverkusen players are nearly ready to return to Leverkusen's squad selection - one could even make his comeback against Heidenheim this weekend!
Bayer Leverkusen are once again looking to keep their hopes alive of winning the Bundesliga as they travel to relegation threatened Heidenheim on Saturday. Heidenheim are currently sat in 16th…

arts.ttl: Heidenheim vs. Bayer Leverkusen preview: Champions travel to face resurgent Heidenheim
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen’s slim Bundesliga title hopes rest on taking all three points when they face relegation-threatened Heidenheim at Voith-Arena on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen have a good chance of bringing Arsenal target Joan Garcia to the BayArena
arts.sum: Bild reports that Bayer Leverkusen have a good chance of bringing Arsenal goalkeeping target Joan Garcia to the BayArena in the summer. Leverkusen are looking to improve their number one position…

arts.ttl: Leverkusen star reported to have release clause amid exit links
arts.sum: Piero Hincapié, who has been linked with a summer exit, has a release clause in his contract with Bayer Leverkusen, according to a report from Spain.

arts.ttl: Preview: Heidenheim vs. Bayer Leverkusen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Heidenheim and Bayer Leverkusen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen queue up for Milan’s Malick Thiaw
arts.sum: Given Milan’s poor Serie A season this time around, absolutely no one in their squad is being considered indispensable. Almost anyone can be sold if a good offer comes in…
